meta.governance.description: Kal톨 톝z톨ma IATF tisi톢 n톝 pala t툶m톨y톝 na톘톨y톝 y톖, 톝z톨ma 톘톨c톖콂n톨 wondu nd툶 t톨-y톖톖 y톖, n톝 톝z톨ma 톘iwoki p톨-y톖톖 n톝 톘톨lak톨 t툶m톨y톝 n톘톨 y톖.

meta.accessibility.description: 쿯z톨ma IATF 침톨n톨톢 se k톨-t톝 int톝rn톝톝t톨 lone 톘톨n톝, 톘톨w톝톝 톝yaa mba pap톨z톨톢 n톝 pat톨l톨-톘톨 y톖 p톖-c톖l톖?

proposal.form.body: P톨sa n톝 콂cosi t톖m nd툶 t톨-y톖톖 l톝, p툶p톖z툶툶 se 콂ma takaya톢 콂ga k톝w톝 p톨-t톝톝 y톖.

proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Takay톨hat툶 nd툶 t톨w톝 p톨-t톝톝 y톖 t톨w톝na kpas톨 Wondu k톨l톨z톨t툶 y톖톖:
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Pa침톖톖z툶툶 t톖m nd툶 t톨-y톖톖 pat톨콂톨톢na n톝 p톖c톖콂n톨-톘툶 y톖.
proposal.form.ready: Al톨waat툶 nd툶 콂tiyi톢-k톝 y톖, IATF ka톢-k톝 톘툶툶 takaya톢 nak톝y톝 taa.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: P툶c톖 n톝 콂tiyi-t툶 l톝, 톘itendi-콂 se 콂t톝z톨 t톨-y톖톖 c톖n툶툶.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: P톨w톝톝 se 콂톘a톢n톨 침톨톢툶 niye t톖m nd툶 t톨-y톖톖 p툶c톖 n톝 콂tiyi-t툶.
proposal.form.turnstileError: P톨t톨k톝 s톖n톖 pap톨zaa n톝 pat톨l톨 se t톖m nd툶 t톨t톨k톝 spam y톖, t톨-y톖톖 p톖c톖na.

proposal.form.success: P톖k톖m n톝 p톖c톖n톨 t톖m nd툶 콂p톖z톨-w톝 y톖 t톨-y톖톖.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ye 톨톘a톢n톨 IATF y톖톖d톨n툶툶 t톖m nd툶 t톨-y톖톖 y톖, 톨taz톨 t톖m nd툶 t톨w톝 p톨-t톝톝 y톖 t톨-taa.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Takay톨hat툶 nd툶 t톨tams톨na \\ Kp톝l톨 kp톝l톝k툶툶 \\ y톖
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Nab툶y툶 t톨톘톖 cam톨y톝 al톨waat툶 nd툶 콂tiyi톢-t툶 y톖. 쿨톨t톝 침a톢 pana n톝 콂tas톨-t툶 ya툶. Ye t톖m nd툶 t톨tas톨 w톝툶 y톖, 콂p톨z톨톢 n톝 콂t톨콂n톨 int톝rn톝톝t톨 y톖톖 n톝 콂cosi-t툶.
